title: Fix branding text and add address + payment detail steps to Bolt Now checkout flow

requirements.text: Update the Payment Successful page copy to replace any instance of "Volt Now"/"VOLTNOW" with "Bolt Now" (case-insensitive), using English user-facing text.

quotes: At payment successfull page it is showing volt now . Change all the volt now to Bolt Now.

acceptanceCriteria: On /payment-success, the thank-you/brand text says "Bolt Now" and does not contain "Volt Now" or "VOLTNOW" anywhere on the page.
All user-facing text remains in English.

requirements.text: Insert an address/location confirmation step between product selection and payment options: after a user selects a battery/product on /buy-now, redirect them to a new address confirmation page where they can either (a) share current location via the browser's GPS/geolocation permission prompt or (b) manually enter an address; only after confirming an address/location should the flow continue to /payment-options.

quotes: After selecting the battery, it should redirect to page asking their address or current location by turning on GPS system. When address is confirmed, it should redirect to payment options.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking "Buy Now" on /buy-now navigates to a new address confirmation route (new page) instead of navigating directly to /payment-options.

The address confirmation page provides: (1) a button to request current location using the browser geolocation API (which triggers the browser permission prompt), and (2) a manual address input option.
The user cannot continue to /payment-options until they have confirmed either a geolocation result (lat/lng) or a non-empty manual address.
After confirming, navigation proceeds to /payment-options while preserving the selected productId and the confirmed address/location data.
If the user denies geolocation permission or an error occurs, the UI shows an English error message and still allows manual address entry and confirmation.

requirements.text: Register the new address confirmation route in the TanStack Router configuration and ensure direct navigation via URL works; update navigation/search parameter handling so /payment-options can receive both productId and the confirmed address/location data with a reasonable fallback when opened directly.

quotes: After selecting the battery, it should redirect to page asking their address or current location... When address is confirmed, it should redirect to payment options.

acceptanceCriteria: The app router includes a new route for the address confirmation page, and visiting the route directly renders the page without crashing.

/payment-options continues to work when opened directly (e.g., no address data present) by showing a reasonable fallback state (e.g., prompting the user to go back to confirm address or continuing with missing address clearly indicated).
The existing product-aware order summary behavior remains functional when productId is present.

requirements.text: On /payment-options, collect payment-method-specific details before allowing the user to proceed: selecting "Credit/Debit Card" must show and require card detail fields; selecting "Mobile Payment" must show and require a phone number field; other payment methods may proceed without extra fields unless already required by existing UI logic.

quotes: Also, payment via credit / debit card should ask for cards details. Mobile payments should ask for phone number .

acceptanceCriteria: When the user selects the "Credit/Debit Card" method, the page displays a card details form (at minimum: card number, expiry date, and CVV) and disables proceeding until the required fields are filled with basic validation.
When the user selects the "Mobile Payment" method, the page displays a phone number input and disables proceeding until a non-empty phone number is provided (basic validation).
When a method that requires extra details is selected, clicking the primary proceed action does not navigate to /payment-success unless the required method-specific inputs are valid.
All new labels, helper text, and validation messages are in English.

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Use only browser geolocation permission flows for GPS/location (no third-party map/location SDK integrations).
Do not add new backend services or external databases; keep changes within the existing single-actor Motoko backend (no backend changes required for this request unless strictly necessary).
nonGoals: Implementing real payment processing or integrating with payment gateways.
Persisting address/payment details to the backend as part of this request (unless explicitly required later).
Adding map UI, reverse-geocoding, or third-party location autocomplete services.
